About Services Field Work Reach Out
Khoj Wellbeing
Exploring wellbeing through stories, relationships and systems.

At Khoj, we believe our emotions, identities, relationships and environment shape how we experience ourselves and the world around us. With the aim to create a more inclusive, accessible and deeply human ecosystem, we work on providing individual therapeutic care, capacity building workshops and advocacy dialogues around emotions and wellbeing.

ApniShala

Hi, I am Shailja!

Counselling Psychologist · Delhi

I work with children, adolescents, parents and educators across schools, communities and therapeutic settings for the past four years. My work spans counselling support, facilitating life skills and wellbeing workshops with parents, teachers and school leaders to strengthen support systems for youth.

My work with youth on concerns like anxiety, grief, body image, trauma and neurodivergent issues helped me understand how wellbeing is rarely an individual work — it lives inside our families, communities and structural systems.

With the belief to honor the context of all our untangled emotions and thoughts, my practice uses a trauma-informed lens with techniques drawn from person-centred, emotion-focused and art-based approaches. Therapy here is about exploring patterns, sitting with discomfort and understanding it — rather than trying to 'fix it.'

Apart from talking about emotions, reading, cuddling furry babies, cooking, and spending time in nature (from going for long walks to lying in grass) are some of my grounding practices. If this aligns with you, let's embark on the journey toward healing and self-discovery together — and yes, that's how I landed with the name Khoj.

Trauma-Informed Person-Centred Emotion-Focused Art-Based Adolescents Neurodivergence
What I Offer

Services

Spaces for healing, learning and building capacity — tailored to different needs and contexts.

Individual Therapy (Adolescents & Young Adults)

A confidential and safe space to talk about anxiety, low mood, life transitions, grief, career and academic pressure, interpersonal challenges, body image and family dynamics. Sessions are guided by the client's pace, emotionally attuned to their experiences, comfort and readiness.

🌐 Online

Parent Consultations

Structured guidance for parents with the aim to help them understand and respond to their child's emotional, behavioural or developmental needs — including neurodivergent learners.

🌐 Online

Wellbeing Awareness Sessions

Capacity building and awareness sessions with schools (adolescents, parents & teachers) and organisations around socio-emotional learning, resilience building, stress management, classroom management, parent-child communication patterns and life skills.

🌐 Online / Offline

Training Program for Educators & Parents

An interactive and reflective learning series equipping educators and caregivers with the skills and perspectives needed to support children's emotional wellbeing. Themes include mental health literacy, psychological first aid, SEL, neurodiversity, inclusive practices and capacity building.

🌐 Online / Offline
Getting Started

How it works

A gentle, no-pressure process to find out if we're the right fit for each other.

1

Fill out the inquiry form

Share your details and schedule a complimentary 20-minute discovery call.

2

Free 20-minute discovery call

An opportunity to discuss what brings you here, understand your expectations, and explore whether we would be a good therapeutic fit.

3

Book your first 50-minute session

If we decide to work together, schedule your first session and begin a journey toward healing, self-discovery and emotional wellbeing.

Field Work

Glimpses from the field

A peek into the work that lives beyond the therapy room — in schools, communities and research.

Research & Conference

Research work on understanding suicidal ideation among adolescents. Presented my qualitative study — 'No One Has Ever Asked Us This Before' — at Dialogica, a national conference organized by Christ University, Bangalore (June 2025).

Workshops & Trainings
Students

Mental wellbeing workshops to equip adolescents with skills for emotional regulation, stress management and resilience — in participatory classroom spaces.

Teachers

Interactive sessions on understanding adolescents' wellbeing, inclusive classroom practices and self-care strategies to prevent educator burnout.

Parents

Capacity building workshops to equip parents with knowledge on mental well-being and support children's emotional health at home.

Let's connect

Whether you're seeking support for yourself, your child, or looking to collaborate — I'd love to hear from you. Fill in the form and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.
